sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53765" key="katagela/simos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταγελάσ-ιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n53765.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ridiculous</tr_>, with play on the name <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Γελάσιμος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plaut.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Stich.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">631</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
